name: Amur Leopard
conservationEfforts: Protected in Land of the Leopard National Park in Russia. Breeding programs in zoos worldwide have maintained a captive population of over 200.
description: The Amur leopard is one of the rarest big cats on Earth, confined to a small area of temperate forest in the Russian Far East and northeast China. Unlike tropical leopards, it has adapted to harsh winters with a thick fur coat.
